author: lOrm
content: #661 closed. Implemented walk_project_skill_dirs() in src/skills.rs which walks every ancestor from cwd up to HOME (inclusive) and collects each .openclaudia/skills/ directory found, deepest-first so child-project skills win on name collision. skill_dirs() now layers managed/policy -> walked project dirs -> user. Legacy find_project_root() anchor is retained as a fall-back when no ancestor has a skills dir yet. 1 unit test pins deepest-first ordering and HOME stop-condition.
